name: statellite-autonomy-plugin
description: Multi-agent satellite autonomy engineering plugin with local skills, contract-driven workflows, and a navigation toolchain MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Contract-driven satellite autonomy workflows with local skills
interface.longDescription: Use Satellite Autonomy to coordinate architecture, contracts, coding, testing, traceability, and local engineering workflows for satellite autonomy development. MCP servers are kept repo-local and enabled manually after validation instead of being auto-started by the plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use the local architecture, contract, coding, testing, and traceability skills to evolve this satellite autonomy repo
Use the repo-local MCP servers manually after they are validated for the current environment
Help me extend the Navigation-first framework while keeping contracts and skills aligned
